output.summary: Adds GPTQ-lite per-layer clip search plus KL-based self-distillation TTT adaptation atop PR#374's 11L stack to mitigate int6 quantization loss.
output.valOnlyReasoning: KL-based self-distillation TTT runs post-training SGD on validation shards with a frozen teacher to adapt to val data.
techniques: Per-layer clip percentile search for GPTQ-lite int6 quantization
Self-distillation TTT using frozen-teacher KL loss on validation data
